title: rubus idaeus f. angustifolius
intro: Rubus idaeus f. angustifolius, also known as the narrow-leaved raspberry, is a variety of the red raspberry plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The narrow-leaved raspberry has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and arthritis, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
